content.en:
Ancient Heavenly Palace.

A Origin Upper Realm Overlord received Ye Tian's summoning message, and he was furious one by one.

"The Endless Lord wants to see the Ancestor of our Ancient Heavenly Palace, what is he?"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor said coldly.

The other Origin Upper Realm Overlords were also unhappy with the Endless Lord, in their opinion, the Endless Lord was just a Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened four or five times, they might be invincible, but compared to the Desolate Ancestor, the founder of the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace, it was simply not worth mentioning.

Desolate Ancestor, that is the Eighth Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, it is second only to the existence of the Origin Ancestor, where is Ye Tian can see it if he wants to!

"Refuse!"

A Origin Upper Realm Overlord replied to Ye Tian.

......

"Refuse me to see the Wild Ancestor!"

Ye Tian received the news but didn't care, he informed the Ancient Heavenly Palace that it was just a politeness.

Soon, he came to the Ancient Heavenly Palace.

Moreover, he directly revealed a wisp of breath to let a Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Ancient Heavenly Palace know that he was coming.

Really.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor and the other Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace Origin Upper Realm Overlords all came out.

The leader is an Origin Dao Ancestor of the Ancient Heavenly Palace, and it is also the Origin Dao Ancestor who has broken the boundaries of the four times-Xuanle Dao Ancestor.

There is nothing too powerful in the land of the Eternal Shore, because this third path is difficult to progress, and it is limited by the origin of the land of the Eternal Shore, and the land of the Eternal Shore does not allow the Origin Dao Ancestor to break through to too high a realm.

But the Origin Dao Ancestor could not be killed, so this Xuanle Dao Ancestor had a very high status in the Ancient Heavenly Palace, second only to the Origin Dao Ancestor.

"Lord of Endless, did you come to our Ancient Heavenly Palace for something?"

Xuanle Daozu asked.

He is not afraid of Ye Tian, even if Ye Tian's strength may be stronger than him, but he is immortal and immortal, and he has the Ancient Heavenly Palace as a backer, so he is afraid that Ye Tian will not succeed?

"Xuanle Dao Ancestor, I want to meet the Desolate Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said.

"Lord of Endless, the Desolate Ancestor has been retreated, and we can't see each other, so you better go back!"

Xuanle Dao Ancestor expelled the Dao.

However, Ye Tian smiled slightly: "Xuanle Dao Ancestor, you can tell me the retreat place of the Desolate Ancestor, and I will go to the Desolate Ancestor myself!"

"Bold!"

Xuanle Dao Ancestor and the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords were completely furious.

It's really that Ye Tian doesn't take the Ancient Heavenly Palace in his eyes, this is a provocation!

"Lord of Endless, are you going to provoke our Ancient Heavenly Palace?"

Xuanle Dao Ancestor's Origin Realm will erupted, and he vaguely urged the power of the Origin of the Eternal Other, and the terrifying aura erupted, and he would attack at any time.

"It looks like we're still going to fight!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

That's when it happened.

Xuanle Daozu made a move.

Rumble!!!!!

The Endless Void was covered by the power of the Origin of the Land on the Eternal Side, as if an endless world had descended to completely suppress Ye Tian.

But at this time.

Ye Tian flicked his fingers, and everything shattered.

The endless void in front of him was like paper paste, torn apart by Ye Tian.

Followed by.

Ye Tian waved his hand, and Xuanle Dao Ancestor moved.

No matter how Xuanle Dao Ancestor burst out his strength, it would be useless.

"This ......"

Xuanle Daozu was dumbfounded.

Only then did he know how huge the gap in strength between himself and Ye Tian was, and it didn't take too long for the Endless Lord to break through to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, although a breakthrough was enough to be comparable to the Fourth Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlord, but it was definitely not easy to break through every time.

But now, Ye Tian has broken through to a realm that he can't imagine, this is too exaggerated!

Seeing this, the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords of the Ancient Heavenly Palace were also unclear, so they all took action.

Xuanle Daozu wanted to remind, but it was too late.

"Get out!"

With a cold snort, these Origin Upper Realm overlords flew upside down in unison and smashed on top of the palaces of the Ancient Heavenly Palace.

And Ye Tian stepped into the Ancient Heavenly Palace.

And such a big movement naturally alarmed the desolate ancestor who was in retreat in the depths of the Desolate Heavenly Palace.

Tear and pull!

The void was torn open, and the Wasted Ancestor walked out of it.

"Ancestor!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor said excitedly, as if he had found the backbone of the heart, and there was no longer any respect for Ye Tian in his heart.

"Ancestor, the Lord of Endless dares to attack our Ancient Heavenly Palace, he must be left behind!"

Wild Blood Road.

The Desolate Ancestor was also very annoyed, he was the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Eighth Awakening, and there were juniors who dared to attack the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace, so he didn't take him seriously!

"You're looking for death!"

The desolate ancestor made a move, holding a sword of reincarnation and treasure, and performed a supreme technique on the other side.

"Die!"

A knife slashed out, as if this territory was being cut to pieces.

This is a move of the Eighth Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord with all his strength.

And Ye Tian also took out his reincarnation treasure spear and blocked the attack of the desolate ancestor with one blow.

Thundered!!!

In this collision, the two sides were almost indistinguishable.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian cast the supreme divine power of reincarnation-the spear of the ruin!

The desolate ancestor also knew the supreme supernatural power of reincarnation, and when he saw this scene, his pupils shrank sharply: "Reincarnation supreme supernatural power!!!

In the entire land of eternity, there was only one Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had created the Supreme Divine Power of Reincarnation, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to create it as well.

"Not good!"

Asozu sensed the crisis.

The secret treasures on his body were stimulated, and the supreme technique of the defense class was also urged with all his might.

However, under the attack of the Supreme Divine Power of Reincarnation, all these secret treasures were destroyed, and even the Supreme Technique of Defense on the other side was shattered like paper paste.

Burst!

Arazu's body was pierced by a blow, and the injuries were difficult to heal.

Seeing that the ancestor was injured, the Desolate Blood Ancestor was dumbfounded.

In his opinion, the Ancestor was one of the oldest and most powerful beings in the entire Eternal Land, and how long had the Endless Lord cultivated, he must be an ant in front of the Ancestor!

As a result, the Ancestor couldn't defeat the Endless Lord.

"Poof!"

The desolate ancestor kept vomiting blood, and the injury was not light, and he was injured by the supreme divine power of reincarnation, and it was difficult to recover.

Just as he was about to escape, Ye Tian put away the reincarnation treasure spear and restrained his breath, this is not fighting.

"Wasted Ancestor, I'm just here to see you and ask about something, and I don't want to fight. If I really attacked the Ancient Heavenly Palace, they would have died a long time ago!" Ye Tian said.

"I see!"

The Wild Ancestor believed.

Immediately, he scolded the Desolate Blood Ancestor and them: "You guys hurry up and apologize to this Endless Lord!"

"Yes!"

The Desolate Blood Ancestor didn't dare to disobey, after all, Ye Tian's strength was too terrifying.

Subsequently, they apologized.

And Ye Tian smiled slightly, walked into the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace, and went to a palace with the Desolate Ancestor.
